$comment: Standalone typecheck config. Mirrors template/tsconfig.json's settings for parity with the scaffolded project after the CLI applies this overlay. The `@/*` path maps the overlay's own src/ first (so `@/features/chat-runtime/...` and the LangChain-flavored `@/features/chat-hedera/server/toolkit` resolve here), then falls through to the template's src/ for everything that is shared (canonical chat types, shared Hedera helpers, prompts, etc.).
